description_long: This is a stylized adult male pedestrian with a rugged, urban appearance. He wears a thick, fur-lined hooded jacket with visible patches and a geometric design on the back, paired with shorts and a single knee pad on his right leg. His left leg is a prosthetic, featuring a metallic, mechanical design, while his right leg is natural and exposed. He has a crossbody pouch strapped to his waist and fingerless gloves on both hands. His head is adorned with a slouchy beanie and a pair of futuristic, wraparound glasses. The overall look suggests a blend of practicality and street fashion, suitable for a modern or near-future city environment.
description: A rugged urban male pedestrian with a fur-lined hooded jacket, shorts, a prosthetic leg, and street accessories. He wears a beanie, futuristic glasses, and a crossbody pouch.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fur-lined hood, beanie, glasses, fingerless gloves, shorts, and the prosthetic right leg.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the beanie, glasses, jacket, pouch, and the mechanical structure of the prosthetic leg.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the geometric design on the jacket's back, the crossbody pouch strap, and the full structure of the prosthetic leg.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the natural right leg, the arm patches, and the layered clothing details.
attribute_clothing_type: urban hooded jacket with fur trim, shorts, fingerless gloves, and a beanie
